changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: New media_directory table — groups media files into thematic directories
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `media_directory` ( `id` int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `from_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `to_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `title` varchar(231) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_as_cs DEFAULT NULL, `folder_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_as_cs DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_as_cs;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `folder` ADD COLUMN `media_directory_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, ADD KEY `folder_fk_media_directory_idx` (`media_directory_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `folder_fk_media_directory` FOREIGN KEY (`media_directory_id`) REFERENCES `media_directory` (`id`);
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE `folder` DROP FOREIGN KEY `folder_fk_media_directory`, DROP INDEX `folder_fk_media_directory_idx`, DROP COLUMN `media_directory_id`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add valid flag to image (NOT NULL, default 0)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `image` ADD COLUMN `valid` bit(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT b'0' AFTER `orig_exif`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: orientation column was BIT(1); widened to INT to hold EXIF orientation values 1-8
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `image` MODIFY COLUMN `orientation` int DEFAULT NULL;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE `image` MODIFY COLUMN `orientation` BIT(1) NULL DEFAULT NULL;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add duration column to image (used for video media)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `image` ADD COLUMN `duration` int DEFAULT '0' AFTER `type`;

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Update ODID_UNIQUE to include valid column so that superseded image records can coexist with their replacements.

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add original_version_id FK from media_file to media_file_version. This completes the circular reference (media_file_version also has a media_file_id FK in the other direction).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file` ADD KEY `media_file_fk_original_version_idx` (`original_version_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_file_fk_original_version` FOREIGN KEY (`original_version_id`) REFERENCES `media_file_version` (`id`);

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add image_id FK on media_file (migration temp column becomes a real FK)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file` ADD KEY `media_file_fk_image_idx` (`image_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_file_fk_image` FOREIGN KEY (`image_id`) REFERENCES `image` (`id`);

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file` ADD KEY `media_file_fk_directory_idx` (`media_directory_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_file_fk_directory` FOREIGN KEY (`media_directory_id`) REFERENCES `media_directory` (`id`);

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Formalise the media_file_id FK on media_file_version
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_file_version` ADD KEY `media_file_version_fk_media_file_idx` (`media_file_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_file_version_fk_media_file` FOREIGN KEY (`media_file_id`) REFERENCES `media_file` (`id`);

changeSet.author: auto
changeSet.comment: Add FK from media_image to image
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `media_image` ADD KEY `media_image_fk_image_idx` (`image_id`), ADD CONSTRAINT `media_image_fk_image` FOREIGN KEY (`image_id`) REFERENCES `image` (`id`);
